de.uka.ilkd.key.taclettranslation.assumptions

Class AssumptionGenerator

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.taclettranslation.assumptions.AssumptionGenerator
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    VariablePool, TacletTranslator

extends Object
implements TacletTranslator, VariablePool

      • translate

        public TacletFormula translate(Taclet t,
                               ImmutableSet<Sort> sorts,
                               int maxGeneric)
                        throws IllegalTacletException
        Throws:
        IllegalTacletException

      • rebuildTerm

        private Term rebuildTerm(Term term)
        Use this method to rebuild the given term. The method splits the term in its single components and assemblies them. After every splitting step the method calls changeTerm. This mechanism can be used to exchange subterms.
        Parameters:
        term - the term to rebuild.
        Returns:
        returns the new term.

      • print

        private void print(Term term)

      • getInstantiationOfLogicVar

                                                LogicVariable lv)

        getInstantiationOfLogicVar in interface VariablePool

        private static void collectGenerics(Term term,
                                    HashSet<GenericSort> genericSorts)

      • generateReferenceTable

        public static byte[][] generateReferenceTable(int objectCount,
                                              int bucketCount)
        Creates an array containing objectCount^bucketCount rows. Each of this rows has bucketCount columns. The method enumerates all possible variations of putting objectCount different objects into bucketCount buckets.
        Example
        For objects= 2 and bucket =3 the method returns:
        000
        001
        010
        011
        100
        101
        110
        111
        Parameters:
        objectCount - the number of objects.
        bucketCount - the number of buckets.
        Returns:
        an array of dimension objectCount^bucketCount x bucketCount

      • checkTable

        public static void checkTable(byte[][] referenceTable,
                              Sort[] instTable,
                              Sort[] genericTable,
                              TacletConditions conditions,
                              Services services)
        Checks the referenceTable whether there are rows that are not allowed. For example: the notSame-Condition is hurted.

      • quantifyTerm

        protected static Term quantifyTerm(Term term,
                                   TermServices services)
                            throws IllegalTacletException
        Quantifies a term, i.d. every free variable is bounded by a allquantor.
        Parameters:
        term - the term to be quantify.
        services - TODO
        Returns:
        the quantified term.
        Throws:
        IllegalTacletException

      • getLogicVariable

        public LogicVariable getLogicVariable(Name name,
                                      Sort sort)
        Returns a new logic variable with the given name and sort. If already a logic variable exists with the same name and sort this variable is returned instead of a new logic variable.
        Specified by:
        getLogicVariable in interface VariablePool
        Parameters:
        name - name of the logic variable.
        sort - sort of the logic variable.
        Returns:
        logic variable with the given name and sort.

      • eliminateSpecialChars

        protected static String eliminateSpecialChars(String name)
        eliminates all special chars.

        private static StringBuffer removeIllegalChars(StringBuffer template,
                                               ArrayList<String> toReplace,
                                               ArrayList<String> replacement)

      • changeTerm

        protected Term changeTerm(Term term)
        Override this method if you want to change the term, i.e. exchanging schema variables for logic variables. See rebuildTerm.
        Parameters:
        term - the term to be changed.
        Returns:
        the new term.

        public void addListener(TranslationListener list)
